0.q: The transcription levels of HbWRKY82 were induced by exogenous Ethrel (ET) (ethylene releaser)... HbWRKY82 might function as an important transcriptional regulator in ET- and ABA-mediated leaf senescence and abiotic stress responses

1.q: HbWRKY82 ... be involved in tapping panel dryness, latex flow and regeneration processes of rubber trees via participating in the ET and reactive oxygen species signaling pathways.

2.q: The transgenic plants also showed higher activity levels of ascorbate peroxidase (APX), superoxide dismutase (SOD) and catalase, and accumulated less hydrogen peroxide (H2O2) and superoxide (O2−)... these findings suggest that HbDHNs act as ROS scavengers.
